idea-plugin.name: WoW Lua Language Server
idea-plugin.description:
A language server for World of Warcraft addon development, powered by wowlua_ls. Built specifically for WoW Lua - not a general-purpose Lua LS with WoW bolted on.

Features

  • 9,000+ WoW API stubs built in - every function, frame type, enum, and global for retail, classic, and classic era
  • Event handler typing - SetScript("OnEvent", handler) types self, event, and per-event payload params
  • XML frame scanning - automatically scans .xml files for frame definitions, virtual templates, and mixin attributes
  • TOC file support - hover, completions, go-to-definition, and diagnostics for .toc files
  • Metatable inference - understands setmetatable + __index, chained metatables, operator metamethods
  • Correlated narrowing - check one return value, and the LS narrows the rest
  • Mixin and template support - CreateFrame returns intersection types automatically
  • Flavor filtering - warns on APIs unavailable in your target game version
  • 70 diagnostics for type safety, nil checking, annotation correctness, and WoW-specific checks
  • Diagnostic plugins - write custom Lua scripts to enforce project-specific conventions
  • Powerful generics, builder patterns, signature help with overload resolution
  • Code completion, go-to-definition, find references, rename, semantic tokens

Setup

The plugin bundles the wowlua_ls binary — no separate install needed. If no bundled binary ships for your platform, it falls back to a wowlua_ls on your PATH.

The plugin drives the language server through the LSP4IJ plugin, which the Marketplace installs automatically as a dependency.

server.name: WoW Lua LS
server.description: Language server for World of Warcraft Lua addon development.
